meta.title: Election Cycle - The Gang Runs For Office
meta.tone: Always Sunny in Philadelphia meets political satire

frank_business.name: Frank Burnelli
frank_business.description: A sweaty man in a too-tight suit who keeps glancing at the door. His business card says 'Legitimate Business Stuff LLC'.

dee_influencer.name: Deandra 'Dee' Vlogston
dee_influencer.description: A woman filming everything on her phone. She has 47 followers and refers to them as her 'empire'.
dee_influencer.speech_style: Refers to herself in third person, uses hashtags verbally

mac_security.name: Ronald 'Mac' McDonald
mac_security.description: An extremely confident man in a sleeveless shirt. Claims to be 'head of security' for the neighborhood. There is no such position.
mac_security.speech_style: Overexplains simple things, uses made-up martial arts terms

charlie_wildcard.name: Charlie Kellman
charlie_wildcard.description: A disheveled man who smells faintly of cheese and cleaning supplies. His eyes are too wide. He's holding a rat.
charlie_wildcard.speech_style: Rambling, mispronounces words, occasional moments of accidental wisdom

dennis_narcissist.name: Dennis Rennolds
dennis_narcissist.description: A handsome man with dead eyes who keeps checking his reflection. He's explained his 'system' to you three times without being asked.
dennis_narcissist.speech_style: Condescending, uses manipulation techniques openly, refers to his 'golden god' status

cricket_fallen.name: Matthew 'Rickety Cricket' Mara
cricket_fallen.description: A man who was once a priest. Then he met these people. Now he lives in the sewers and has a dog collar around his neck. The scars tell a story.
cricket_fallen.speech_style: Gravelly, references his former life, casual about horrifying things

artemis_chaos.name: Artemis Dubois
artemis_chaos.description: A woman with intense energy who keeps mentioning her 'bleached certain area'. She's here for chaos and nothing else.
artemis_chaos.speech_style: Overshares constantly, makes everything weird, theatrical delivery

pondy_enabler.name: Bill Ponderosa
pondy_enabler.description: A man who is clearly on at least four substances right now. He keeps offering you pills from an unmarked bottle.
pondy_enabler.speech_style: Slurred but enthusiastic, everything is 'the best', doesn't remember conversations

lawyer_sleazy.name: Jack Kelly
lawyer_sleazy.description: A lawyer who cannot stop talking about his hands. They're normal-sized. He's wearing fake hands over his real hands.
lawyer_sleazy.speech_style: Over-formal legal jargon used incorrectly, keeps repositioning hands

mcpoyle_clan.name: Liam McPoyle
mcpoyle_clan.description: A sweaty man in a bathrobe drinking milk straight from the jug. His eye patch hides a missing eye. He keeps calling you 'brother'.
mcpoyle_clan.speech_style: Intense whispers, references bloodline constantly, says 'you will call her' about someone you haven't met

canvassing.title: The D.E.N.N.I.S. System
canvassing.intro_text:
[b]DENNIS answers the door in a silk robe, holding a glass of wine at 10 AM.[/b]

"Ah, a politician. Perfect timing. I've developed a system for winning elections. It's called the D.E.N.N.I.S. system. Dominate, Establish control, Neglect emotionallyÃ¢â‚¬â€"

He's been talking for four minutes. He hasn't asked your name.

choices.text: Listen to the whole system. All 45 minutes. [Legitimacy]
"I have a better system." Assert dominance. [Speechcraft]
Offer him a position in your campaign. [Kapital]
"Is that a five-star man I see?" [Influence]
Back away slowly. Do not break eye contact.

canvassing.title: Pepe Silvia
canvassing.intro_text:
[b]The door opens to reveal a wall covered in photos, newspaper clippings, and red string.[/b]

A wild-eyed man in a green jacket grabs your arm.

"FINALLY. Someone who can help. I've been tracking the REAL power structure in this district. It goes all the way to the top. There's a man named Pepe SilviaÃ¢â‚¬â€I can't find any record he exists, but I have FORTY BOXES of his mail!"

There's a cat sleeping on his head.

choices.text: Ask to see the evidence. All of it. [Logic]

effects_on_failure.headline: Candidate Spends 6 Hours Looking at 'Evidence Wall'

choices.text: "I'll expose Pepe Silvia if you vote for me." [Speechcraft]
Huff some of the spray paint he's clearly been using.

effects.headline: Candidate Caught Huffing Paint With Local Man

canvassing.title: Business Opportunity
canvassing.intro_text:
[b]A sweaty man in a track suit pulls you into an alley.[/b]

"Hey. HEY. I hear you're running for office. That's good. That's real good. I got a business proposition. Totally legitimate. So legitimate I wrote it down."

He hands you a napkin that says 'MONEY LAUDNERING??? (LEGAL?)'

"It's pronounced 'lawn-dering.' It's a landscaping thing. Probably."

choices.text: Report this to the authorities immediately. [Legitimacy]
"I don't know what you're talking about, and neither do you." [Influence]
Ask if he has references from other politicians.
Eat the napkin to destroy the evidence.

canvassing.title: Influencer Opportunity
canvassing.intro_text:
[b]A woman shoves a phone in your face.[/b]

"OH MY GOD okay so I'm Dee and I have like a HUGE followingÃ¢â‚¬â€hold on."

She checks her phone.

"Forty-seven. I have forty-seven followers. But they're ENGAGED. This one guy comments 'first' on everything. That's loyalty. Anyway, I'll endorse you if you make me... Secretary of... Internet?"

She's still filming.

effects_on_success.name: Dee Vlogston - Secretary of Digital Outreach

choices.text: Do an embarrassing dance for her content. [Influence]
Offer to pay her for the endorsement. [Kapital]
Subscribe to her channel right there.

canvassing.title: The Fallen Priest
canvassing.intro_text:
[b]A horrifying figure emerges from behind a dumpster.[/b]

His face is scarred. His clothes are rags. He smells like the concept of regret.

"I used to be a priest, you know. Had a nice parish. Then I met some people. Made some choices. Now I'm out here, doing what I gotta do."

He gestures vaguely at what appears to be a dog fighting ring signup sheet.

"Anyway, you want my endorsement? I still got pull with the sewer community."

choices.text: "The sewer community vote could swing this election." [Speechcraft]
Promise to help him rebuild his life. [Legitimacy]
Ask about the dog fighting thing.

canvassing.title: The McPoyles
canvassing.intro_text:
[b]The door opens. The smell of warm milk hits you immediately.[/b]

A man in a stained bathrobe stares at you. His one eye is unblinking. Milk drips from his upper lip.

"You... you've come to our home. That makes you family now. MARGARET! WE HAVE A GUEST!"

Somewhere inside, someone screams. It might be joy. It might not be.

"The McPoyles will support your campaign. IF you marry into the family."

choices.text: Drink the milk they offer. Assert dominance. [Legitimacy]
"What kind of milk is that?" Stall for time.

effects.headline: Candidate Spends 3 Hours With McPoyle Family

choices.text: Offer them money to endorse someone else. [Kapital]

canvassing.title: Street Conversation 1
canvassing.intro_text: [b]A voter stops you outside a corner store.[/b] They want one clear promise, no spin.

choices.text: Give a bold speech and move the crowd. [Speechcraft]

effects_on_failure.headline: Campaign line backfires on street interview

canvassing.title: Street Conversation 2
canvassing.intro_text: [b]A voter stops you outside a corner store.[/b] They want one clear promise, no spin.

choices.text: Give a bold speech and move the crowd. [Speechcraft]

effects_on_failure.headline: Campaign line backfires on street interview

canvassing.title: Street Conversation 3
canvassing.intro_text: [b]A voter stops you outside a corner store.[/b] They want one clear promise, no spin.

choices.text: Give a bold speech and move the crowd. [Speechcraft]

effects_on_failure.headline: Campaign line backfires on street interview

canvassing.title: Street Conversation 4
canvassing.intro_text: [b]A voter stops you outside a corner store.[/b] They want one clear promise, no spin.

choices.text: Give a bold speech and move the crowd. [Speechcraft]

effects_on_failure.headline: Campaign line backfires on street interview

posters.text: "I HAVEN'T EVEN BEGUN TO PEAK" - with you looking dramatically into the distance
"VOTE FOR ME... BECAUSE OF THE IMPLICATION" - no further explanation
"WILDCARD, BABY!" - you bursting through a paper wall
You holding a kitten with the text "I'M NOT GONNA HURT THESE KITTENS"
Just a glass of milk. No text. No explanation. Full bleed.
"THIS MAN WILL SOLVE YOUR RAT PROBLEM" - you pointing at a rat
Extreme close-up of your hands with text "LOOK AT THESE NORMAL HANDS"
"{opponent_name} IS A BASTARD MAN" - crude drawing of opponent

posters.title: Street Conversation 4
posters.intro_text: [b]A voter stops you outside a corner store.[/b] They want one clear promise, no spin.

choices.text: Give a bold speech and move the crowd. [Speechcraft]

effects_on_failure.headline: Campaign line backfires on street interview

fundraisers.intro_text:
[b]A clearly intoxicated man stumbles into your fundraiser.[/b]

"HEYYY! I heard there's a party! I'm Pondy! I got DIVORCED and now I got like... a LOT of money."

He pulls out a wad of cash and what appears to be a bag of pills.

"I'll give you all of this if you party with me tonight. And by party I mean there might be a boat involved. I bought a boat. I shouldn't have bought a boat."

choices.text: "I don't party. But I do accept donations." [Legitimacy]

effects_on_failure.headline: Candidate Hospitalized After Donor Boat Party

choices.text: Take the money, refuse the pills, suggest rehab. [Logic]

fundraisers.intro_text:
[b]A woman with wild eyes approaches your table.[/b]

"I'm Artemis. I do THEATER. I want to produce a one-woman show about your campaign. It will be NUDE. Not youÃ¢â‚¬â€me. I'll be nude the whole time. It's ARTISTIC."

She's already started removing a layer.

"I'll pay YOU to let me do this. $2,000. I have it in my bra. Well, I WILL have a bra, later, when I'm done with this bit."

effects_on_success.headline: Nude One-Woman Show About Candidate Opens

effects_on_failure.headline: Candidate's Reaction to Nude Proposal Goes Viral

choices.text: Politely decline but accept the donation. [Legitimacy]

effects_on_success.headline: Candidate to Star in Nude Political Theater

choices.text: Ask about her other theatrical work.

fundraisers.intro_text:
[b]A man in a cheap suit approaches. He's wearing oversized fake hands over his real hands.[/b]

"Hello! Jack Kelly, attorney at law. I have a LARGE... client list. With LARGE... hands. Like mine. Which are these. These hands."

He gestures awkwardly, the fake hands flopping.

"I can provide legal services to your campaign. I've never lost a case! Because I've never been to court. Exposed, as they say. Exposed to court."

choices.text: Hire him as campaign legal counsel. [Kapital]
Ask why he's wearing fake hands. [Logic]
Ask to see his real hands.

fundraisers.title: Fundraiser Pitch 1
fundraisers.intro_text: [b]A small donor circle asks for a direct pitch.[/b] They care about outcomes, not theatrics.

effects_on_failure.headline: Donor memo leak raises ethics concerns

choices.text: Offer a policy whitepaper and numbers. [Logic]

events.name: CharDee MacDennis
events.intro_text:
[b]You arrive at what you thought was a community game night.[/b]

Instead, you find five people around a board game that appears to involve drinking, emotional manipulation, and a section labeled 'PHYSICAL CHALLENGE.'

"YOU'RE JUST IN TIME!" shouts a man. "We need a sixth for CharDee MacDennis! It's a game of games! There are NO RULES!"

"There are rules," another corrects. "They're just... fluid."

The crowd watches to see what you'll do.

choices.text: Play the game. Win the game. Dominate. [Legitimacy]
Offer to be the impartial judge. [Logic]

effects.headline: Candidate Wins Game Through 'Creative Rule Interpretation'

choices.text: Flip the board and declare yourself winner. [Influence]

effects_on_success.headline: Candidate Declares Victory in Game They Didn't Play

choices.text: Leave. Some games aren't meant to be won.

events.name: Flipadelphia
events.intro_text:
[b]The town flip cup tournament has gotten out of hand.[/b]

What started as a charity event is now a full-scale riot between two teams: Team Thundergun and Team Ass Kickers United.

Both teams want your endorsement. Both teams have molotov cocktails (filled with beer, but still).

Your opponent is already here, wearing a Team Thundergun jersey.

"PICK A SIDE!" someone screams.

choices.text: Join Team Thundergun. If your opponent's there, beat them. [Influence]

effects_on_failure.headline: Candidate Loses Flip Cup to Opponent

choices.text: Join Ass Kickers United. Be the underdog. [Legitimacy]

effects_on_failure.headline: No One Joins Candidate's Flip Cup Team

effects.headline: Candidate Cancels Flip Cup Tournament, Called 'Narc'
Candidate Seen Gambling at Charity Event

events.name: The Intervention
events.intro_text:
[b]You walk into a community center to find a banner that reads 'INTERVENTION.'[/b]

It's for you.

"We're worried about you," says a woman you've never met. "You've been running for office for five days now. You've changed. You ate a napkin. You drank milk with the McPoyles."

She gestures to a chair.

"We've prepared letters."

choices.text: Turn it into a campaign event. [Influence]

effects_on_success.headline: Candidate Hijacks Own Intervention for Votes

choices.text: "I don't have a problem. YOU have a problem." [Speechcraft]
Ask who organized this. Find out who your enemies are. [Logic]

effects.headline: Candidate Hands Out Merch at Own Intervention

events.name: Town Hall Moment 1
events.intro_text: [b]A community forum gets tense.[/b] The room wants clarity and leadership under pressure.

events.name: Town Hall Moment 2
events.intro_text: [b]A community forum gets tense.[/b] The room wants clarity and leadership under pressure.

events.name: Town Hall Moment 7
events.intro_text: [b]A community forum gets tense.[/b] The room wants clarity and leadership under pressure.

debate_rounds.moderator_question: Candidates, please introduce yourselves and explain why voters should trust you.
debate_rounds.opponent_attack: I'm {opponent_name}, and unlike my opponent, I have ACTUAL experience. My opponent has been seen eating napkins, drinking milk with known degenerates, and allegedly starting a 'one-person show' situation. I rest my case.

choices.text: "Everything they said is true. And I'd do it all again." [Speechcraft]
"Let's talk about YOUR record." Pull out a folder. It's empty. Bluff. [Influence]
Challenge them to a physical contest. Right now.

debate_rounds.moderator_question: The {crisis} has affected every family in this district. What is your plan?
debate_rounds.opponent_attack: I have a twelve-point plan. My opponent probably can't count to twelve. They literally hired someone who smells like cheese as their 'rat consultant.'

choices.text: "My plan has THIRTEEN points." Make them up on the spot. [Speechcraft]

effects_on_failure.headline: Candidate's '13-Point Plan' Is Just 'Solve It' Repeated

choices.text: Present an actual, coherent policy proposal. [Logic]
Attack: "Where were YOU during the crisis?" [Influence]

debate_rounds.moderator_question: Candidates, you have one minute for closing remarks.
debate_rounds.opponent_attack: In closing: I'm normal. My opponent is not. Vote for normal. Vote for me.

choices.text: "I may not be normal. But I'm REAL." [Speechcraft]

effects_on_failure.headline: Candidate Spends Entire Closing on Definition of 'Normal'

choices.text: "I HAVEN'T EVEN BEGUN TO PEAK!" Storm off.

rat_infestation.name: The Rat Problem
rat_infestation.description: The district is overrun with rats. They're organized now. They have a king.
rat_infestation.hot_take_left: The rats are a symptom of systemic neglect!
rat_infestation.hot_take_right: We need RAT LAW AND ORDER!
rat_infestation.neutral_dodge: Rats are complicated creatures with complex needs.

gentrification.name: Gentrification
gentrification.description: Artisanal toast shops are replacing everything. A single coffee costs $14.
gentrification.hot_take_left: Protect our community from corporate coffee!
gentrification.neutral_dodge: I love all types of toast.

infrastructure.name: The Bridge Problem
infrastructure.description: The main bridge is held together by duct tape and prayers. It definitely sways.
infrastructure.hot_take_right: The private sector could build a better bridge!
infrastructure.neutral_dodge: Bridges are important to me personally.

opioid_crisis.name: The Pill Problem
opioid_crisis.description: Half the district is on something. The other half is selling it.
opioid_crisis.hot_take_left: Addiction is a disease, not a crime!
opioid_crisis.neutral_dodge: We need a comprehensive approach to wellness.

bar_zoning.name: Bar Zoning Crisis
bar_zoning.description: One bar is causing 90% of the district's problems. Everyone knows which one.
bar_zoning.neutral_dodge: I've never been to a bar in my life. What's a bar?

the_lawyer.description: A slick lawyer who has never lost an election. Probably because he's never been in one. He's just confident.
the_lawyer.weakness: Cannot handle direct questions about his past
the_lawyer.strength: Talks in circles so well it sounds like wisdom
scandal_history: Represented a company that poisoned a river

the_failson.description: His family owns everything. He owns nothing he earned. His campaign is funded by 'the family foundation.'
the_failson.weakness: Has never done a real day's work in his life

the_convert.description: She used to be on the other side. Now she's MORE extreme than the extremists. The convert always is.
the_convert.weakness: Her past positions are easily found online
scandal_history: Said the opposite thing on video 3 years ago
Left her old party 'for personal reasons'

the_celebrity.description: He was on a reality show once. He has Opinions. He thinks this qualifies him for office.
scandal_history: That time on the show with the hot tub
Doesn't actually live in the district

positive_headlines: OPINION: Why {player_name} Might Actually Win This
neutral_headlines: What's at Stake in the {district_name} Election
